Log:
  NFS-Ganesha is an NFSv3,v4,v4.1 fileserver that runs in user mode.
  It also supports the 9p.2000L protocol.

  WWW: https://github.com/nfs-ganesha/nfs-ganesha

  PR:		230776
  Submitted by:	fatih@gandi.net
  Sponsored by:	Gandi.net
